pre_game.message: Hey D, I'm F—nice to meet you. I'm here because I really need to win some money for my parents' medical bills; it's been tough lately. What about you, what's your story?

Hey F, nice to meet you too—I'm really sorry about your parents, that must be so stressful. I'm here because I lost a big chunk in the stock market recently and need to win some back for my family; what's been the hardest part for you lately?

Thanks, D, that means a lot—honestly, the hardest part has been the constant worry about not being able to ease my parents' pain, especially with bills piling up; how's your family holding up through all that stock market chaos?
Oh, I get that worry all too well, F—it's heartbreaking; my family's been pretty shaken by the loss, but we're all hanging in there and counting on this game to help us get back on track.
I hear you, D—it's rough when family depends on us; I'm rooting for both of us in this game, so what's one thing you're hoping to do if we pull through?
Thanks, F, that means a lot—I'm rooting for us too; if we pull through, I'd really love to use the winnings to pay off some bills and finally take my family on a trip to make up for the hard times.

That's awesome, D—sounds like it'll mean the world to your family; if I win, I'd use it to finally clear my parents' medical bills and give them some relief, what destination are you thinking for that trip?
Oh, absolutely, F—that sounds like a huge relief for your parents; for the trip, I've been dreaming of Hawaii, with its beautiful beaches to help us all relax and forget the tough times for a bit.
Oh, Hawaii sounds like a dream getaway, D—that's such a great idea for recharging; I've never been, but it makes me think of how much my parents would love a simple outing again if we win this.
That's sweet, F—I hope a simple outing brings your parents some joy soon; I'm feeling pumped for the game too, let's both crush it and make our families proud!
Thanks, D, that's really kind—I'm excited for the game too, let's crush it and make our families proud!
